mapper.select: SELECT partner_id AS partnerId, partner_name AS partnerName, business_number AS businessNumber, contact_name AS contactName, contact_phone AS contactPhone, status AS status, commission_rate AS commissionRate, reject_reason AS rejectReason, created_at AS createdAt FROM partner ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT partner_id, partner_name FROM partner WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY partner_name ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE partner
status = #{status},
commission_rate = #{commissionRate},
reject_reason = #{rejectReason},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE partner_id = #{partnerId}
